block_03: Will Parliament vote for or against Theresa May’s Brexit deal?
block_04: On the evening of Tuesday, March 12, Parliament is scheduled to vote on the latest Brexit withdrawal agreement reached by Prime Minister Theresa May and the European Union.
block_05: If the Brexit plan is rejected, the UK will need to decide whether it will leave the EU on March 29 without a deal. Another delayed vote isn’t out of the question. Analysts say this level of uncertainty could lead to volatility for the British pound.
block_06: Will GBP trading pairs soar or take a dive? Now might be a good time to make a prediction.
